name: Alexco Resource Corp.
description: Alexco Resource Corp. is a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company. The Company is primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of mineral properties, with a primary focus on silver, lead, and zinc. Alexco is the owner and operator of the historic Keno Hill Silver District in Yukon, Canada, one of the highest-grade silver districts in the world. Additionally, the company provides environmental consulting and remediation services through its Alexco Environmental Group division.
